description: CRA Form RC151 — GST/HST credit for newcomers
title: RC151 GST/HST Credit and Canada Carbon Rebate Application for Individuals Who Become Residents of Canada
content:
RC151 GST/HST Credit and Canada Carbon Rebate Application for Individuals Who Become Residents of Canada
Download instructions for fillable PDFs
You
must download
the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use
Acrobat Reader 10 or later
to open the file. Do
not
click the link to open it in your web browser.
Download and save the PDF to your computer
Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Fill out this form to apply for the goods and services tax/harmonized sales tax (GST/HST) credit and the Canada Carbon Rebate for the year in which you became a resident of Canada.
Ways to get the form
Use the online form
RC151 (web version)
Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You
must
download and open fillable
PDFs
in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
Accessible
Fillable PDF (rc151-fill-25e.pdf)
Print and fill out by hand
Standard print PDF (rc151-25e.pdf)
Download and listen
Use your preferred screen reader to listen to the e-text file.
E-text (rc151-25e.txt)
Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
Page details
2026-03-10
